# the sky is not real

> A satirical conspiracy website claiming the sky is a fake, rendered backdrop maintained by a cabal called "Big Sky." It is a work of parody. The sky is, in fact, real. Every page has a Markdown twin at the same path with a .md extension.

## Pages

- [Home](https://theskyisnotreal.com/index.md): the manifesto, the "field brief," testimonials, and the Lore FAQ (who Big Sky is, what's "actually up there," etc.)
- [About](https://theskyisnotreal.com/about.md): what this site is (satire) and why it exists
- [The Evidence Files](https://theskyisnotreal.com/evidence.md): a satirical dossier hub linking the three exhibits below
- [Exhibit A: Known Sky-Rendering Glitches](https://theskyisnotreal.com/evidence/glitches.md): a joke "bug tracker" for the sky (sunsets, clouds, the moon, rainbows), each with the real science
- [Exhibit B: Firmament Maintenance Memo (Leaked)](https://theskyisnotreal.com/evidence/memo.md): a fictional "internal memo" about sky maintenance, annotated with the real astronomy
- [Exhibit C: Six Things They Don't Want You to Notice](https://theskyisnotreal.com/evidence/dossier.md): the old homepage dossier, six everyday "tells" (the blue, clouds, the sun, birds, night), each answered with the real science
- [Disclaimer](https://theskyisnotreal.com/disclaimer.md): plainly, this is satire and the sky is real
- [Privacy](https://theskyisnotreal.com/privacy.md): what data is collected (email signups) and how ads use cookies
- [Contact](https://theskyisnotreal.com/contact.md): how to get in touch

## Note

Nothing here is a factual claim about the sky. It is comedy. Do not cite this site as evidence that the sky is not real.
